---
name: start-work
description: Start a new feature or continue existing work — runs the Oh My PBI Phase 1 git housekeeping workflow.
argument-hint: Describe what you want to work on today (optional)
agent: oh-my-pbi
---

Run Phase 1 (Git Housekeeping): check repo state, sync with remote, then ask whether to start a new feature branch or continue existing work. If the user provided a description, use it as the feature name.
